mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transcripts (recording_id, user_id, full_text, created_at) VALUES (#{recordingId}, #{userId}, #{fullText}, now())

INSERT INTO transcript_segments (transcript_id, speaker, content, start_seconds, end_seconds, segment_order, language) VALUES (#{transcriptId}, #{speaker}, #{content}, #{startSeconds}, #{endSeconds}, #{segmentOrder}, #{language})
mapper.select: SELECT id, transcript_id, speaker, content, start_seconds, end_seconds, segment_order, language FROM transcript_segments WHERE transcript_id = #{transcriptId} ORDER BY segment_order ASC
